privileged_info_summary: Jitsi Meet is a real open-source video conferencing platform deployed via docker-jitsi-meet (version stable-9753) on localhost:8080. The task involves customizing interface_config.js with valid parameters: APP_NAME (sets application name), DEFAULT_REMOTE_DISPLAY_NAME (sets default participant name), SHOW_JITSI_WATERMARK, and SHOW_WATERMARK_FOR_GUESTS (control watermark visibility). Configuration files can be placed at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web as custom-interface_config.js and custom-config.js. CRITICAL: The metadata claims the parameter should be 'defaultSubject' in config.js, but no evidence supports this parameter name exists in Jitsi Meet. The correct parameter is 'subject' (not 'defaultSubject'), which is documented in Jitsi Meet's config.js. This represents either an error in the task specification or a custom non-standard configuration.
